textByHash.da376bd5642dc7679a9f17c31151a4c7323b5267: I have a riddle for you.
textByHash.1a6c83a96105842250190eb57228ad8803a0ac2b: A tree which is planted on Monday and doubles in size each day is fully grown on the following Sunday. On what day is it half grown?
textByHash.512ef92a9c96cf5b9d508b224ffd972ae93a82ff: Saturday. You big folk really aren't the quickest!
textByHash.09ad471ba68c095a82b61eacfd5df9618b9a4a74: To be or not to be.
textByHash.87f76e2c9a12e1aac4af22a917b63bfafdcf472a: My mum says: A friendly look, a kindly smile one good act, and life's worthwhile!
textByHash.14917a945ebaa66a1f1e21390abcf61cbec30e68: I wrote a few children's books.
textByHash.ea30580d6675dc84a5065d364b30d1f053afea14: The human mind is a tremendous thing.
textByHash.f51cb272665efc9aca74506a7d01bf870c09863c: Real generosity is doing something nice for someone who will never find it out.
textByHash.910959a0584bd7021522aebf461e829011f149c0: But then it doesn't tend to rain much around here.
textByHash.1fb8e6146fa0be331243669f5594a111f6cfc191: Hardy, ha ha! Hee, hee hee!
textByHash.eb0fc1b9f747119ea5ab4b187886691e2b65469d: I'm a little tree gnome. That is me!
textByHash.8ef4db4ed41666b094ac972c2588e5bc27b6e4e1: I am the beginning of eternity and the end of time and space. I am the beginning of every end and the end of every place. What am I?
textByHash.847f79bd84b9d70598afc0a47712d2f78fa0d669: I'm 'e'! Hee hee! Do you get it?
textByHash.6c8dbef67d595bf728f270354b9d28232ea70d4c: I worship Guthix, the god of balance.
textByHash.4317a8351013b3708a96d2cc1f00975dec64dbfe: He really does have exceptional co-ordination.
textByHash.4eb246835b4fb4356069f44f51027244d6791526: Not really, I just saw a man with a wooden leg.
textByHash.eec09c40be9aa4478c451a69ef13047f06bbe117: I'm making wine out of raisins.
textByHash.095d113d0822b17a8fd72af2c8474b0fd8a13cf0: So I don't have to wait for it to age.
textByHash.3ccdc4151d40d0a6d4c92fe4279d7fe161ed72e5: She does I tell you. She really loves me!
textByHash.635e62ee1b4525c92ab81472ef3764f4b8a81fdc: I just want something to happen!
textByHash.803e87a2ca8fd053301277274cb27f806c97d205: Something, anything, I don't know what!
textByHash.b9acc2eb2da950696b825f7541d2e7b8298ef38b: A little inaccuracy sometimes saves tons of explanation!
textByHash.9faf555aca9dacdfa938c673e011eeb044a65870: Hello. Why are you so tall?
textByHash.2cd03525420146f34922a35e0876ad68cca59230: Maybe you should eat more worms.
textByHash.5fbd9020b25fc2634da8889fd3511eb1ad811b8f: Guthix's angels fly so high as to be beyond our sight but they are always looking down upon us.
textByHash.29866671cd66a7fff0be849acfe118a066ee54f9: Hello, would you like a worm?
textByHash.304d324e43dc2ed95a885dc5306027f657a09297: In the gnome village those who are needy receive what they need, and those who are able give what they can.
textByHash.05610915e66f3d157c432d11bdf741eb669ffbcb: Dimensionality is a function of consciousness.
textByHash.50698e6223b7727dd627a0fbdd42d0e72933bff4: That's all you need to know.
textByHash.6f944a6a3957297dc546cb2d08e6c99543606c43: Surely, if you're scared to die...
textByHash.04c6ac859f0299601df48c79da3c5316a8b16890: A warning traveller! The new world will rise from the underground!
textByHash.a7f9c04678bc8ca1d71a735b51944a11e2a62bf3: Some advice traveller. We can walk, run, row or fly but never lose sight of the reason for the journey or miss the chance to see a rainbow on the way.
textByHash.6531c8c50455279f8909b84b87e60f0ec76c880e: I'm always at peace with myself.
textByHash.bdd283f2e6aad5c14dbbd3ba40b107f1de037ef1: I'm gonna sweep you off your feet.
textByHash.a51036d69c5961fcd334b6f5c66f133b9cc6de10: Hey big man, watch where you're standing.
textByHash.b6d1a15e319a54f2900b72f2916093377675f86b: Hey big woman, watch where you're standing.
textByHash.b56f2200cd1bc954f62f8fba3b01f6b92cfecf1b: I wouldn't want to make a mess of your shoes.
textByHash.2d29c8fcfa86ed24512080cf1555674610c6bbe7: Have you seen our big tree?
textByHash.d6ee704f4065a62bbe638ea906bd78548f582a35: You are the contained centre of an O.
textByHash.b3a81756bbda451b96b4b586e96b7dbe9cd4f042: While me, I'm much more. I am the pyramidic containment of an A.
textByHash.7bf676ab20dc6efba8fd0db65270c6a403030c7a: I'm trying to make a comeback!
textByHash.50b6c6fc7372b4b45b715b312efc2560679e4ff3: It's hard when you haven't been anywhere.
textByHash.4cfe5efb8a8808b63d81cfcde9c4f743d47edb00: Aaaaarrggghh... humans! Run for your lives!
textByHash.dfa90ff71f991e176f2a3fbd95f3d7307ba2686e: Hello brave adventurer. A warrior like you should go a long way.
textByHash.f505e4435781c5e133eecf2a1882bda5b99f9f0a: The further, the better! Hee hee!
textByHash.f13b5f5eb4d1d408f8eb25b13866bb40dcd15769: Es ataris eto meriz ip prit es gutus!
textByHash.16a6ccec4b6c0db313527632483c03b64c82cd22: Not great, it's just... well... people just don't seem to take me seriously!
textByHash.944b6262d4e0d29fc3f830b433f7b73c38dba489: Why don't you make like a tree...
textByHash.a642f885f78768215379c284b5820f79e37c8901: Top of the morning to you.
textByHash.df8a01a7c2242d8b4d9751a97d377e35e149bcfe: The only thing that is constant...
